rows: In life, you were a brilliant research scientist. You pioneered many early innovations in computer science in the 1960s, under the helpful aegis of your mentor at Cal Tech. However, just as you were on the brink of having your work acknowledged, two tragedies befell you. First, you were Embraced by Clan Tremere, who were highly interested in your computer skills. Second, and even worse, your mentor had stolen your work; putting his name on your long years of effort and was lauded for it! You could extract only a petty revenge, as the chantry began making many demands on your time and resources, transfering you out of Los Angeles, where they had removed their chantry, and placing you in Las Vegas. You were put to work researching blood magic and unlocking the supernatural properties of vitae. You made several valuable insights into the development of thaumaturgy, but, again, your work was stolen and the credit given to another, your master in the clan. You had just enough clout to get out of your old chantry and win an appointment to San Diego. Here, your research continues. You are determined to make a truly brilliant breakthrough in the field of thaumaturgical research, one you can put your own name on. And, if you can swing it, you can even bring shame to the regent who stole your work for their own.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Regent of the 5th, your former regent in Las Vegas who you would dearly love to discredit. You know she is a Cathayan researcher.

rows: After hunting on the Westside you had the strange suspicion that you were being following by something unseen.  While you were unable to pierce whatever magic was hiding your pursuer, you believe you were able to lose them before returning to the Chantry.  Specified Rituals in place before Elysium, Deflection of Wooden Doom, Warding Circle, Vessel of Transference.

8/12/2016 22:57:07                Franklen Richards        Tremere        
Santa Monica        none                        
(2 bonus actions from Humunkulis) Names of the 2 demons, reserching the demon courts contact coltest to get in touch with the Demon court        Yes

                >>Research continues without any breakthroughs.  Checking on this with Plot

Helping Archons        No        

                >>FBM Scene

lvl 1 ritual:warding circle, 2 social traits(3-5)        8

9/10/2016 Franklin Richards 

Hunt West Los Angeles (Camarilla)        hunting with App. Naysmith                                

Resurching Ferras bow (1)

        >>This is a demon weapon, similar to the sword carried by Naismith.  Likely it is the symbol of the demonic pact made between Farrah and her demonic master.  You suspect the disease it spreads is linked to some personal failing or fear of Farrah herself. Perhaps she is a disease carrier as well – if shes not careful with her feeding habits this could be a way to find or track her movements.

        >>Also,  the Horned Society of Las Vegas have recently reached out to you and asked for any information you have on the demonic activity in LA.  You're not sure how, but they know a lot about the demonic weapons you've been tracking and researching.

resurching cure for the infernal disease 

        >>With Isha's help you're certain that the disease is sustained by the mystical wounds caused by the bow and never progresses to the point of directly harming he carrier. Once the wounds are healed, the disease disappears without a trace.  Even the samples you take from the infected become clean.    

(2) 2 DT are from Homonculus.        No                0

Pasadena Assault
Seven Tremere entered Pasadena as per their agreement with the Anarch Baron.  The NPM's control of the area has been seriously eroded.

Hollywood Defense
You do what you can to shore up Hollywoods defenses

Scrying Ritual on Farrah
You beleive the scrying ritual on Farrah used some very esoteric techniques from the Horned Society, though old these methods would only be known by a ranking member of the Society.  You now know Archon Lee is not currently a member of the secret society, but you suspect she may have been a member in the past.  The failed ritual could only have failed through the direct suberversion of a demonic power.  Farrah or her demonic master knew they were beign targetted and set a trap for Archon Lee.  Willingly or not, someone in the Chantry is passing information to one or more of these demons.

West LA Patrol/Defense
A large group of tremere keep a vigilant eye over their domain. No one attempts to challenge your control

Pasadena Assault
Four Tremere entered Pasadena as per agreement with the Anarch Baron.  Your Ally is gaining control

Demon Name:  You've managed to decipher the True Name of a lesser demon bound to the greater demon M.  You now believe you could use this true name to summon and control this lesser demon.

Researching Technomancy

DTs


- You've managed to decipher the True Name of a lesser demon bound to the greater demon M.  You now believe you could use this true name to summon and control this lesser demon.
From your research you know that the lesser demon you can summon is a direct servitor of M.   And through that lesser demon you should be able to learn a lot more about M and maybe even gain some power over M.



Convocation

During the convocation you are contacted by several members of the Horned Society.  You do not talk about the secret society openly during the convocation, but they subtly hint that a Lord has taken an interest in your work on LA's demonic infestation.  They wish you well and hope that you will be able to establish a Chantry of your own one day where members of the society could come to more vigorously study their craft.  They also were able to pass along to you that a potential Horned Society recruit was being maneuvered to the LA chantry from DC (Cohn Rose) and that they hope you will have a strong but subtle influence on their study of Lores and other more practical subjects.

- You patrol/Defend West LA - Other results TBD by Scene

--Word has gotten out to the Horned Society that you are on the verg of binding a demon.  Many younger HS apprentices approach you and offer their support also they say a powerful Lord is watching you and that such a feat coudl see you raised up to Regent and given a Chantry full controlled by the Horned Society, somethign that hasn't occured since the fall of the notorious Baghdad Chantry.

-Focused Mind is an Uncommon Path.  One of the Horned Society members teaches you the basics and you quickly develop a natural flare for it, no loner needing a teacher.

MAR DTs

-Defend West LA.  The NPM seems to be defending its own turf and left your domain alone this month.  Something has gotten them on the defensive or they are eager to consolidate their past gains.

- Lion Court Scene conference call and meeting with Eli Tompkins run with Patric/Theo

- Your homuncullis shifts through the paperwork found on the Archon and you quickly discver it lists places in LA where the Gargoyle ritual was performed and partial lists of Kindred who were used to create the new batch of slaves.  You suspect a few of the names belong to missing Camarilla vampires.

- Patrol and defend west LA   -    At least 3 Chinese criminal gang work for the NPM in West LA and one of them (The Spirit Gardeners) is closely tied to Naismith/Farrah's Wu/Coterie.  You spot even less activity from them in West LA then last month, either they are concealing themselves better or they are concentrating on defense. .

-learn Banish Big brother.  Need 1 more xp to elarn Rearch skill

Patrol and Defend West LA - Santa Monica and the surrounding area are easily the most well defended portion of the city.   You eoncounter no resistance or hostiles on your patrol.  The enenmy knows not to approach your territory in the open.

- You will need objects, places or people with a connection to the demons to research them further

Patrol and Defend West LA - Santa Monica and WLA are the most well defended portion of the city.  Some have started calling it fortress Tremere.  You encounter no resistance or hostiles on your patrol.  The enenmy knows not to approach for this is the heart of Camarilla control in Los Angeles.

- The Horned Society is eager to begin your training in technomancy, but fears that others are beign promoted ahead of you.  They wish to help you become a regent of your own Chantry but think that others such as Cohn Rose, Eugene Ducheski and Isha Patel are outmaneuvering you.   They an secretly meet with you to start your training but unless they see sem progress towards your own regency, they cannot risk being exposed by meeting with you too often.
Building Ritual Database offline and hidden from Technocracy.
Building a connection with Tara Elliot - very pro-pyramid
